scoping.selected_writer_rationale: etl.usp_load_dim_employee is the sole direct writer to dbo.Dim_Employee, implementing SCD Type 2 via a two-phase UPDATE+INSERT pattern using SHA2_256 hash change detection. All other procedures referencing Dim_Employee (usp_load_fact_inventory_receipt, usp_load_fact_po, usp_load_fact_requisition) are read-only consumers joining on Employee_BK/IsCurrent.

classification.rationale: The writer proc follows the classic SCD2 expire-and-insert pattern: Phase 1 expires changed rows by setting EffectiveEnd and IsCurrent=0, Phase 2 inserts new history rows with EffectiveStart/EffectiveEnd/IsCurrent=1. Column shape (EffectiveStart, EffectiveEnd, IsCurrent) confirms dim_scd2.

primary_key.rationale: Catalog declares PK_Dim_Employee on Employee_SK, which is an INT IDENTITY column — a definitive surrogate key per catalog auto_increment_columns.

natural_key.rationale: Employee_SK is confirmed surrogate via catalog identity signal; Employee_BK (VARCHAR(20), mapped from src.EmployeeCode) is the business key used in both the expire UPDATE and the NOT EXISTS insert guard in the proc body.

watermark.rationale: No WHERE-clause watermark filter exists in the proc; DW_InsertDate (DATETIME2) is set via SYSUTCDATETIME() on each insert and is the best available datetime watermark for dbt incremental strategy on newly inserted SCD2 rows.

pii_actions.rationale: FullName matches the full_name PII column name pattern and contains personally identifiable employee data.
Email matches the email PII column name pattern and contains personally identifiable employee contact data.

refactor.extracted_sql: SELECT dw.Employee_SK, dw.Employee_BK, dw.FullName, dw.Email, dw.Department, dw.JobTitle, dw.IsActive, dw.EffectiveStart, DATEADD(DAY, -1, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) AS EffectiveEnd, 0 AS IsCurrent, dw.DW_InsertDate, dw.SourceRowHash FROM [dbo].[Dim_Employee] dw INNER JOIN [PTP_System].[Master].[Employees] src ON dw.Employee_BK = src.EmployeeCode AND dw.IsCurrent = 1 WHERE dw.SourceRowHash <> HASHBYTES('SHA2_256', CONCAT_WS('|', src.FullName, src.Email, src.Department, src.JobTitle, CAST(src.IsActive AS CHAR(1)))) UNION ALL SELECT dw.Employee_SK, dw.Employee_BK, dw.FullName, dw.Email, dw.Department, dw.JobTitle, dw.IsActive, dw.EffectiveStart, dw.EffectiveEnd, dw.IsCurrent, dw.DW_InsertDate, dw.SourceRowHash FROM [dbo].[Dim_Employee] dw WHERE NOT ( dw.IsCurrent = 1 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM [PTP_System].[Master].[Employees] src WHERE src.EmployeeCode = dw.Employee_BK AND dw.SourceRowHash <> HASHBYTES('SHA2_256', CONCAT_WS('|', src.FullName, src.Email, src.Department, src.JobTitle, CAST(src.IsActive AS CHAR(1)))) ) ) UNION ALL SELECT NULL AS Employee_SK, src.EmployeeCode AS Employee_BK, src.FullName, src.Email, src.Department, src.JobTitle, src.IsActive, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AS EffectiveStart, CAST('9999-12-31' AS DATE) AS EffectiveEnd, 1 AS IsCurrent, CAST(CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AS DATETIME2) AS DW_InsertDate, HASHBYTES('SHA2_256', CONCAT_WS('|', src.FullName, src.Email, src.Department, src.JobTitle, CAST(src.IsActive AS CHAR(1)))) AS SourceRowHash FROM [PTP_System].[Master].[Employees] src WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM [dbo].[Dim_Employee] dw WHERE dw.Employee_BK = src.EmployeeCode AND dw.IsCurrent = 1 )
refactor.refactored_sql: WITH source_employees AS ( SELECT * FROM [PTP_System].[Master].[Employees] ), existing_dim_employee AS ( SELECT * FROM [dbo].[Dim_Employee] ), changed_employees AS ( SELECT dw.Employee_SK, dw.Employee_BK, dw.FullName, dw.Email, dw.Department, dw.JobTitle, dw.IsActive, dw.EffectiveStart, dw.EffectiveEnd, dw.IsCurrent, dw.DW_InsertDate, dw.SourceRowHash FROM existing_dim_employee dw INNER JOIN source_employees src ON dw.Employee_BK = src.EmployeeCode AND dw.IsCurrent = 1 WHERE dw.SourceRowHash <> HASHBYTES('SHA2_256', CONCAT_WS('|', src.FullName, src.Email, src.Department, src.JobTitle, CAST(src.IsActive AS CHAR(1)))) ), expired_rows AS ( SELECT dw.Employee_SK, dw.Employee_BK, dw.FullName, dw.Email, dw.Department, dw.JobTitle, dw.IsActive, dw.EffectiveStart, DATEADD(DAY, -1, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) AS EffectiveEnd, 0 AS IsCurrent, dw.DW_InsertDate, dw.SourceRowHash FROM changed_employees dw ), unchanged_rows AS ( SELECT dw.Employee_SK, dw.Employee_BK, dw.FullName, dw.Email, dw.Department, dw.JobTitle, dw.IsActive, dw.EffectiveStart, dw.EffectiveEnd, dw.IsCurrent, dw.DW_InsertDate, dw.SourceRowHash FROM existing_dim_employee dw WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM changed_employees c WHERE c.Employee_SK = dw.Employee_SK ) ), new_rows AS ( SELECT NULL AS Employee_SK, src.EmployeeCode AS Employee_BK, src.FullName, src.Email, src.Department, src.JobTitle, src.IsActive, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AS EffectiveStart, CAST('9999-12-31' AS DATE) AS EffectiveEnd, 1 AS IsCurrent, CAST(CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AS DATETIME2) AS DW_InsertDate, HASHBYTES('SHA2_256', CONCAT_WS('|', src.FullName, src.Email, src.Department, src.JobTitle, CAST(src.IsActive AS CHAR(1)))) AS SourceRowHash FROM source_employees src WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM existing_dim_employee dw WHERE dw.Employee_BK = src.EmployeeCode AND dw.IsCurrent = 1 ) ), final AS ( SELECT Employee_SK, Employee_BK, FullName, Email, Department, JobTitle, IsActive, EffectiveStart, EffectiveEnd, IsCurrent, DW_InsertDate, SourceRowHash FROM expired_rows UNION ALL SELECT Employee_SK, Employee_BK, FullName, Email, Department, JobTitle, IsActive, EffectiveStart, EffectiveEnd, IsCurrent, DW_InsertDate, SourceRowHash FROM unchanged_rows UNION ALL SELECT Employee_SK, Employee_BK, FullName, Email, Department, JobTitle, IsActive, EffectiveStart, EffectiveEnd, IsCurrent, DW_InsertDate, SourceRowHash FROM new_rows ) SELECT * FROM final
